title: Axolotl Man's Money
description: his is a mod that adds currency into your game.
body:
[![hosting ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d4ccf68084d5bcd931ec540bbe8cbcc4e51c16.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/axolotl-man)



this is a mod that adds currency into your game. there are four tears of currency: money, money stack, money bag and money block. money can be crafted by combining paper and an emerald and to upgrade your money just put four of a kind in a crafting table.



the assets for this mod were taken from [City Modernities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/city-modernities) by [Renared_688](https://www.curseforge.com/members/renared_688/projects)
